entries.name: geography-refresh-maxmind
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 03:00 UTC: download the latest GeoLite2-City.mmdb. Skipped when MAXMIND_LICENSE_KEY absent or config('geography.schedule.refresh_maxmind_weekly')=false.

entries.name: geography-warm-cache
entries.purpose: Hourly at :20: pre-populate top-N reference-catalog cache entries.

entries.name: geography-reconcile-vendor
entries.purpose: Monday 05:00 UTC: dry-run reconciliation check between our DB rows + vendor seeder to surface drift after upstream vendor updates.
